'''hahoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caballeria|caballeria]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caballeria|caballeria]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hahoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæheketh|hæheketh]] || [[word:hæhekej|hæhekej]] || [[word:hæhekesh|hæhekesh]] || [[word:hæheke|hæheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahohokoth|hahohokoth]] || [[word:hahohokoj|hahohokoj]] || [[word:hahohokosh|hahohokosh]] || [[word:hahohoko|hahohoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahokoth|hahokoth]] || [[word:hahokoj|hahokoj]] || [[word:hahokosh|hahokosh]] || [[word:hahoko|hahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahofkoth|hahofkoth]] || [[word:hahofkoj|hahofkoj]] || [[word:hahofkosh|hahofkosh]] || [[word:hahofkof|hahofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahokotho|hahokotho]] || [[word:hahokojo|hahokojo]] || [[word:hahokosho|hahokosho]] || [[word:hahokoko|hahokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahokoth|hahokoth]] || [[word:hahokoj|hahokoj]] || [[word:hahokosh|hahokosh]] || [[word:hahoko|hahoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahokothol|hahokothol]] || [[word:hahokojol|hahokojol]] || [[word:hahokoshol|hahokoshol]] || [[word:hahokokol|hahokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahokothotho|hahokothotho]] || [[word:hahokojojo|hahokojojo]] || [[word:hahokoshosho|hahokoshosho]] || [[word:hahokoko|hahokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahokothon|hahokothon]] || [[word:hahokojon|hahokojon]] || [[word:hahokoshon|hahokoshon]] || [[word:hahokokon|hahokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahokothoro|hahokothoro]] || [[word:hahokojoro|hahokojoro]] || [[word:hahokoshoro|hahokoshoro]] || [[word:hahokokoro|hahokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
